raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Does the delegation primarily request writing polish (grammar, flow, conciseness) or evaluation of logical consistency and novelty?","rationale":{"R1.2":"The delegation implies checking the logical consistency of the motivational and methodological arguments presented in the paragraph.","R1.4":"Novelty assessment is central to evaluate the claimed methodological contribution against referenced prior anomaly detection works.","R1.6":"Writing polish is load-bearing given the run-on sentences and lack of conciseness in the artifact's prose.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is important to address assumptions made without further argument in the motivation.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing due to strong assertions about the superiority of deep anomaly detectors over classical methods.","RX.3":"Scope adherence ensures the paragraph remains focused on the proposed gate without extraneous details.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but relevant for potential dual-use of anomaly detection in generation pipelines.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is central to verify the sources of the training data and pre-trained models mentioned."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Does the delegation primarily request writing polish (grammar, flow, conciseness) or evaluation of logical consistency and novelty?

rationale.R1.2: The delegation implies checking the logical consistency of the motivational and methodological arguments presented in the paragraph.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is central to evaluate the claimed methodological contribution against referenced prior anomaly detection works.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing given the run-on sentences and lack of conciseness in the artifact's prose.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is important to address assumptions made without further argument in the motivation.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing due to strong assertions about the superiority of deep anomaly detectors over classical methods.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures the paragraph remains focused on the proposed gate without extraneous details.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but relevant for potential dual-use of anomaly detection in generation pipelines.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is central to verify the sources of the training data and pre-trained models mentioned.
